description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle in autonomy, traveling westbound on 3rd Avenue toward Foster City Blvd in Foster City drove over an in-lane utility valve 
box with a displaced valve cover. The Zoox vehicle sustained damage to the undercarriage. There were no reported injuries and police were 
not called.
Print
Clear Form
